description: An FCPXML built by edit-timeline-spec parses back to the same markers, chapters, keywords, and titles (lossless round-trip).

input.fcpxml_path: <FCPXML built from a package with 2 markers, 2 chapters, 1 keyword, 1 title>

description: An FCPXML with an empty timeline returns a valid empty edit-package plus a gaps[] note.

input.fcpxml_path: <FCPXML with a gap spine and no markers>

description: Malformed FCPXML returns the validator error, not a partial guess.
